ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment item */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., axe, sword, shield) */,
  "atk" INTEGER /* Attack power of the equipment */,
  "def" TEXT /* Defensive capabilities of the equipment */,
  "mag_pwr" INTEGER /* Magical power of the equipment */,
  "acquisition" TEXT /* Method of acquiring the equipment (e.g., outfitters, poach, treasure) */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the equipment */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the equipment */,
  "durability" INTEGER /* Durability of the equipment */,
  "Sell_value" INTEGER /* Sell value of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment type (e.g., axe, sword, shield) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_sets" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment set */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_set_items" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment set */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment item in the set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id", "equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength attribute of the character */,
  "agility" INTEGER /* Agility attribute of the character */,
  "intelligence" INTEGER /* Intelligence attribute of the character */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience points of the character */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Gold owned by the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_equipment" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character using the equipment */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment being used */,
  "equip_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was equipped */,
  "durability" INTEGER /* Current durability of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enemies" (
  "enemy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enemy */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the enemy */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Strengths of the enemy */,
  "weakness" TEXT /* Weaknesses of the enemy */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health points of the enemy */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience points awarded for defeating the enemy */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Gold awarded for defeating the enemy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enemy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drop_rates" (
  "enemy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enemy dropping the equipment */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment being dropped */,
  "drop_rate" REAL /* Drop rate of the equipment (as a decimal value) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enemy_id", "equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode (e.g., melee, rendezvous) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity (e.g., poaching, catching, treasure hunting) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "reward_experience" INTEGER /* Experience points awarded for completing the activity */,
  "reward_gold" INTEGER /* Gold awarded for completing the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_participants" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character participating in the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id", "character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the social feature (e.g., friend list, guild, leaderboard) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the social feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "friendships" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the friend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "friend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guilds" (
  "guild_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guild */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the guild */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the guild */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guild_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guild_members" (
  "guild_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guild */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character in the guild */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the character in the guild (e.g., leader, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guild_id", "character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character being ranked */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the character */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the character */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("mode_id")
)
